lessons.title: What is Linear Algebra?
lessons.body:
Linear algebra is the study of vectors, matrices, and linear transformations.

A vector in \(\mathbb{R}^2\):

lessons.title: Vector Addition & Scalar Multiplication
lessons.body: Try the interactive canvas below (we'll add it next).

lessons.title: Lines and Planes in \(\mathbb{R}^n\)
lessons.body:
Visualize linear equations as intersections of lines (2 eqs) or planes (3 eqs).

Example: \(x + 2y = 5\) is a line in \(\mathbb{R}^2\).

lessons.title: Geometric Solutions to Ax = b
lessons.body: The solution is the intersection point of the rows interpreted as hyperplanes.

quiz.q: How many solutions does a consistent system of 2 equations in 2 variables usually have?

lessons.title: Gaussian Elimination Process
lessons.body:
Forward elimination turns A into upper triangular U using row operations.

Pivot → eliminate below.

lessons.title: Augmented Matrix and Row Reduction
lessons.body: Example: Solve using augmented matrix \([A | b]\).

quiz.q: What is the first step in Gaussian elimination?

lessons.title: Matrix Addition, Multiplication, Powers
lessons.body: AB means columns of B transformed by A.

lessons.title: Invertible Matrices and Inverse Computation
lessons.body: A is invertible if \(\det(A) \neq 0\) and full rank.

quiz.q: If A is invertible, then Ax = b has how many solutions?

lessons.title: LU Decomposition Basics
lessons.body: A = LU where L lower triangular (1's on diagonal), U upper.

lessons.title: Solving Systems with LU
lessons.body: Lc = b → Ux = c (forward + back substitution).

lessons.title: Transpose Properties (A^T)^T = A, (AB)^T = B^T A^T
lessons.body: Symmetric matrices: A = A^T.

lessons.title: Permutation Matrices and PA = LU
lessons.body: Row exchanges = multiplication by permutation matrix P.

lessons.title: Problem Set 1 Review
lessons.body: Review problems from Chapters 1–5. Due this week.

lessons.title: Definition and Examples of Vector Spaces
lessons.body: Subspaces must be closed under addition and scalar multiplication.

lessons.title: Column Space, Nullspace, Row Space
lessons.body: Col(A), Nul(A), Row(A) = Col(A^T).

lessons.title: Special Solutions and Free Variables
lessons.body: Nullspace = all solutions to homogeneous equation.

chapters.title: 8. Rectangular PA = LU and Ax = b

lessons.title: Least Squares via Normal Equations
lessons.body: For overdetermined systems: A^T A \hat{x} = A^T b.

lessons.title: Problem Set 2 Review
lessons.body: Practice rectangular systems and projections. Due.

lessons.title: Exam Review & Practice
lessons.body: Review key concepts from early chapters. Practice problems recommended.

lessons.title: Applications in Data, ML, Physics
lessons.body: Linear algebra powers PCA, neural nets, finite elements, etc.

lessons.title: Comprehensive Review & Practice Exam
lessons.body: Review all chapters. Good luck on the final!
